LanguageData.VAspirE_AchieveExcruciatingPain.descript: {0} wants to achieve an exquisite, excruciating pain.
LanguageData.VAspirE_AchieveExcruciatingPain.label: achieve excruciating pain
LanguageData.VAspirE_AcquireSuperpower.label: gain a superpower
LanguageData.VAspirE_AnimaTreeLink.description: {0} wants to undergo an anima tree linking ritual with them as the main recipient of the boons.
LanguageData.VAspirE_AnimaTreeLink.label: link with anima tree
LanguageData.VAspirE_AttendSpeech.description: {0} wants to be there when an inspirational speech is given.
LanguageData.VAspirE_AttendSpeech.label: attend an inspirational throne speech
LanguageData.VAspirE_BeBondedToARoyalAnimal.descripti: {0} would like to bond with one of the royal animals.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BeBondedToARoyalAnimal.label: be bonded to a royal animal
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeAConsul.description: {0} wants to gain a rank of a consul in the imperial hierarchy.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeAConsul.label: become a consul
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeAHentaiCharacter.descripti: {0} wants to get a warped body.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeAHentaiCharacter.label: get a tentacle
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeAnAndroidLover.description: {0} wants to fall in love with an android.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeAnAndroidLover.label: become an android lover
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeDisliked.description: {0} wants to be hated by many of their peers.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeDisliked.label: become disliked
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeFungoid.label: become a fungoid
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeGrandParent.description: {0} wants to become a grandparent and have a grandchild.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeGrandParent.label: become a grandparent
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeIdeologicalFigure.descript: {0} wants to become a meaningful figure in their ideology.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeIdeologicalFigure.label: become an ideological figure
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeInhuman.description: {0} wants to be dominated by the psychic patterns of the void and become inhuman.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeInhuman.label: become inhuman
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeLeader.description: {0} wants to lead their people from a position of power.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeLeader.label: become a leader
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeLiked.description: {0} wants to be liked by many of their peers.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeLiked.label: become liked
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeMechanitor.description: {0} wants to control the march of the machines.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeMechanitor.label: become a mechanitor
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeNoble.description: {0} wants to join the imperial great hierarchy.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeNoble.label: become noble
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeParent.description: {0} wants to become a parent and have a child of their own.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeParent.label: become a parent
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomePsycaster.description: {0} wants to become acquainted with the psychic powers of psycasters.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomePsycaster.label: become a psycaster
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeRich.description: {0} wants their colony to prosper and become excessively rich.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeRich.label: become rich
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeSanguophage.description: {0} wants to live forever as a sanguophage.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeSanguophage.label: become a sanguophage
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeTranscendent.description: {0} wants to become one of the transcendent.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BecomeTranscendent.label: become transcendent
LanguageData.VAspirE_BondWithAnimal.description: {0} wants to bond with an animal companion.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BondWithAnimal.label: bond with an animal
LanguageData.VAspirE_BurnSomeLuciferium.description: {0} wants to get rid of some disgusting luciferium in a crematorium or fireplace.
LanguageData.VAspirE_BurnSomeLuciferium.label: burn some luciferium
LanguageData.VAspirE_ChainsawHands.description: {0} wants to get a gene that improves innate hand melee attacks.
LanguageData.VAspirE_ChainsawHands.label: get a melee gene
LanguageData.VAspirE_CompleteMachineBody.description: {0} would like to have 6 different artificial body parts.
LanguageData.VAspirE_CompleteMachineBody.label: complete machine body
LanguageData.VAspirE_ConnectWithGauranlenTree.descrip: {0} would love to connect with a Gauranlen tree in a tree linking ceremony.
LanguageData.VAspirE_ConnectWithGauranlenTree.label: connect with a gauranlen tree
LanguageData.VAspirE_ConsumeHumanMeat.description: {0} wants to see what long pig tastes like.
LanguageData.VAspirE_ConsumeHumanMeat.label: consume human meat
LanguageData.VAspirE_ConsumeLuciferium.description: {0} wants to ride the luciferium high.
LanguageData.VAspirE_ConsumeLuciferium.label: consume luciferium
LanguageData.VAspirE_ConsumeOpium.label: consume opium
LanguageData.VAspirE_CreateLegendary.description: {0} wants to leave their mark on the world and create a legendary work.
LanguageData.VAspirE_CreateLegendary.label: create a legendary work
LanguageData.VAspirE_DeadRival.description: {0} would like to have a rival, and for them to die.
LanguageData.VAspirE_DeadRival.label: dead rival
LanguageData.VAspirE_DefeatFactionLeader.description: {0} wants to be the one to defeat an enemy faction leader.
LanguageData.VAspirE_DefeatFactionLeader.label: defeat faction leader
LanguageData.VAspirE_DestroyCluster.description: {0} wants to completely destroy a mech cluster.
LanguageData.VAspirE_DestroyCluster.label: destroy a mech cluster
LanguageData.VAspirE_DestroyInsectHive.description: {0} wants to completely destroy an insect hive.
LanguageData.VAspirE_DestroyInsectHive.label: destroy an insect hive
LanguageData.VAspirE_DrinkAperitif.description: {0} would like to taste the luxury that is the aperitif.
LanguageData.VAspirE_DrinkAperitif.label: drink aperitif
LanguageData.VAspirE_EarnACornerstone.description: {0} desires to witness the technological advancement of their faction, the achievement of the cornerstone.
LanguageData.VAspirE_EarnACornerstone.label: earn a cornerstone
LanguageData.VAspirE_ExperienceResurrection.descripti: {0} wants to experience true death and be resurrected using a mech serum.
LanguageData.VAspirE_ExperienceResurrection.label: experience resurrection
LanguageData.VAspirE_FeelCatharsis.description: {0} wants to unbottle their feelings and feel the serenity afterwards.
LanguageData.VAspirE_FeelCatharsis.label: feel catharsis
LanguageData.VAspirE_FormPsychicBond.description: {0} wants to psychically bond with a perfect partner.
LanguageData.VAspirE_FormPsychicBond.label: form a psychic bond
LanguageData.VAspirE_GainALevel5Psycast.description: {0} would like to gain access to a psycast of the fifth level.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GainALevel5Psycast.label: gain a level five psycast
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetBeautifulLover.description: {0} wants to be told that they are punching above their weight, and become lovers with a beautiful person.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetBeautifulLover.label: get a beautiful lover
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetBionicSpine.description: {0} would love to have a bionic spine.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetBionicSpine.label: get bionic spine
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetBlackoutDrunk.label: get blackout drunk
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetDigested.description: {0} wants to get digested whole. {0} swears this is not a kink thing.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetDigested.label: get digested
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetEntombed.description: {0} wants to be entombed in a warcasket.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetEntombed.label: get entombed
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetFiveBurnScars.description: {0} wants to get five burn scars.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetFiveBurnScars.label: get five burn scars
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetInspiration.label: get inspiration
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetJoywired.description: {0} would like to feel the effects of joywire.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetJoywired.label: get joywired
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetMarried.label: get married
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetRidOfAsthma.description: {0} wants to get rid of asthma.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetRidOfAsthma.label: get rid of asthma
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetRidOfCataracts.description: {0} wants to get rid of cataracts.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetRidOfCataracts.label: get rid of cataracts
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetRidOfHearingLoss.description: {0} wants to get rid of hearing loss.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetRidOfHearingLoss.label: get rid of hearing loss
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetSomeLovin.description: {0} would like to get some lovinâ€™.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetSomeLovin.label: get some lovin'
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetUltimateRevengeOnCentipede.de: {0} wants to shred a Centipede blaster to show him who's boss now.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GetUltimateRevengeOnCentipede.la: get ultimate revenge on a Centipede
LanguageData.VAspirE_GrowOld.description: {0} wants to live long enough to see a different person in the mirror.
LanguageData.VAspirE_GrowOld.label: grow old
LanguageData.VAspirE_HaveWonderfulRoom.description: {0} wants to have the most wonderful bedroom.
LanguageData.VAspirE_HaveWonderfulRoom.label: have a wonderful room
LanguageData.VAspirE_HearAnimaScream.description: {0} wants to hear the screams of a dying anima tree.
LanguageData.VAspirE_HearAnimaScream.label: hear anima scream
LanguageData.VAspirE_HeldConcert.description: {0} would like to hold a concert for other colonists.
LanguageData.VAspirE_HeldConcert.label: held a concert
LanguageData.VAspirE_JoinTheDeserters.description: {0} wants to join the deserter cause.
LanguageData.VAspirE_JoinTheDeserters.label: join the deserters
LanguageData.VAspirE_KillSomeone.description: {0} wants to inflict pain and kill another being.
LanguageData.VAspirE_KillSomeone.label: kill someone
LanguageData.VAspirE_LearnToShapeFlesh.description: {0} wants to see another person use the flesh shaping ability.
LanguageData.VAspirE_LearnToShapeFlesh.label: witness flesh shaping
LanguageData.VAspirE_MeetAngelicPawn.description: {0} wants to meet an angelic being that radiates a pristine beauty.
LanguageData.VAspirE_MeetAngelicPawn.label: meet an angelic being
LanguageData.VAspirE_NuzzleWithTheFleshling.descripti: {0} would like to nuzzle with the fleshling monstrosity.
LanguageData.VAspirE_NuzzleWithTheFleshling.label: nuzzle with the fleshling
LanguageData.VAspirE_ObtainLegendaryGear.description: {0} wants to feel the work of a legendary master in their grasp.
LanguageData.VAspirE_ObtainLegendaryGear.label: obtain legendary gear
LanguageData.VAspirE_Overdose.description: {0} wants to see what itâ€™s like to overdose.
LanguageData.VAspirE_Overdose.label: overdose
LanguageData.VAspirE_PlayWithCube.description: {0} wants to play with a golden cube.
LanguageData.VAspirE_PlayWithCube.label: play with a golden cube
LanguageData.VAspirE_Propose.description: {0} would like to propose to somebody.
LanguageData.VAspirE_Propose.label: propose
LanguageData.VAspirE_RaidABioLab.label: raid a bio-lab
LanguageData.VAspirE_ReadAFascinatingTome.description: {0} wants to read a fascinating eldritch tome.
LanguageData.VAspirE_ReadAFascinatingTome.label: read a fascinating tome
LanguageData.VAspirE_ReadAmazingBook.description: {0} wants to read a book detailing a skill on which they are passionate about.
LanguageData.VAspirE_ReadAmazingBook.label: read an amazing book
LanguageData.VAspirE_RideInAClassicCar.description: {0} would love to feel classy and ride in the classic car.
LanguageData.VAspirE_RideInAClassicCar.label: ride in a classic car
LanguageData.VAspirE_SeeAurora.description: {0} wants to skygaze during an aurora.
LanguageData.VAspirE_SeeAurora.label: see an aurora
LanguageData.VAspirE_UseADeclassifier.description: {0} wants to see what itâ€™s like to use a deserter declassifier on an enemy noble.
LanguageData.VAspirE_UseADeclassifier.label: use a declassifier
LanguageData.VAspirE_UseFireWeapon.description: {0} wants to use a flame weapon in combat.
LanguageData.VAspirE_UseFireWeapon.label: use a flame weapon
LanguageData.VAspirE_UseXenotypeInjector.description: {0} wants to change xenotype by using a xenotype injector.
LanguageData.VAspirE_UseXenotypeInjector.label: change xenotype
LanguageData.VAspirE_WieldBladelink.description: {0} would like to bond with a bladelink weapon.
LanguageData.VAspirE_WieldBladelink.label: wield bladelink weapon
LanguageData.VAspirE_Winged.description: {0} wants to get a gene that gives wings.
LanguageData.VAspirE_Winged.label: fly
